51	    <#
52	    .SYNOPSIS
53	        Analyzes conventional commit messages to determine the version bump type.
54	    .DESCRIPTION
55	        Scans commit messages for conventional commit prefixes:
56	        - "feat!:" or "fix!:" or "BREAKING CHANGE" -> major
57	        - "feat:" -> minor
58	        - "fix:" -> patch
59	        Returns the highest-priority bump type found.
60	    #>
61	    [CmdletBinding()]
62	    param(
63	        [Parameter(Mandatory)]
64	        [AllowEmptyCollection()]
65	        [string[]]$CommitMessages
66	    )

68	    $hasMajor = $false
69	    $hasMinor = $false
70	    $hasPatch = $false
71	
72	    foreach ($msg in $CommitMessages) {
73	        # Skip empty lines
74	        if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($msg)) { continue }
75	
76	        # Strip leading hash/short-sha prefix (e.g. "abc1234 feat: ...")
77	        $cleaned = $msg -replace '^\s*[a-f0-9]+\s+', ''
78	
79	        # Check for breaking changes: "type!:" suffix or "BREAKING CHANGE" anywhere
80	        if ($cleaned -match '^\w+!:' -or $cleaned -match 'BREAKING CHANGE') {
81	            $hasMajor = $true
82	        }
83	        # Check for feat (minor bump)
84	        elseif ($cleaned -match '^feat(\(.+\))?:') {
85	            $hasMinor = $true
86	        }
87	        # Check for fix (patch bump)
88	        elseif ($cleaned -match '^fix(\(.+\))?:') {
89	            $hasPatch = $true
90	        }
91	    }
92	
93	    # Return highest priority bump type
94	    if ($hasMajor) { return 'major' }
95	    if ($hasMinor) { return 'minor' }
96	    if ($hasPatch) { return 'patch' }
97	    return 'none'
98	}

name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, master]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  version-bump:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Install PowerShell
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if ! command -v pwsh &> /dev/null; then
            apt-get update && apt-get install -y wget apt-transport-https software-properties-common
            wget -q "https://packages.microsoft.com/config/ubuntu/22.04/packages-microsoft-prod.deb"
            dpkg -i packages-microsoft-prod.deb
            apt-get update && apt-get install -y powershell
          fi
          pwsh --version

      - name: Create version file
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if [ ! -f VERSION.txt ]; then
            echo -n "0.1.0" > VERSION.txt
          fi

      - name: Run version bumper with fixture data
        id: bump
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          # Use the minor commits fixture for a deterministic test
          $result = & ./Invoke-VersionBump.ps1 -VersionFile VERSION.txt -CommitLogFile ./fixtures/commits-minor.log
          # Capture the output for the step
          $result | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ }
          # Extract the new version from output
          $newVer = (Get-Content VERSION.txt).Trim()
          Write-Host "Bumped version is: $newVer"
          echo "new_version=$newVer" >> $env:GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Verify version was bumped
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $ver = (Get-Content VERSION.txt).Trim()
          Write-Host "Final version in VERSION.txt: $ver"
          if ($ver -ne '0.2.0') {
            Write-Error "Expected version 0.2.0 but got $ver"
            exit 1
          }
          Write-Host "Version bump verified: $ver"

  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install PowerShell
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if ! command -v pwsh &> /dev/null; then
            apt-get update && apt-get install -y wget apt-transport-https software-properties-common
            wget -q "https://packages.microsoft.com/config/ubuntu/22.04/packages-microsoft-prod.deb"
            dpkg -i packages-microsoft-prod.deb
            apt-get update && apt-get install -y powershell
          fi
          pwsh --version

      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $config = New-PesterConfiguration
          $config.Run.Path = './SemanticVersionBumper.Tests.ps1'
          $config.Output.Verbosity = 'Detailed'
          $config.Run.Exit = $true
          Invoke-Pester -Configuration $config

name: Semantic Version Bumper

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, master]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, master]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  version-bump:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Install PowerShell
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if ! command -v pwsh &> /dev/null; then
            apt-get update && apt-get install -y wget apt-transport-https software-properties-common
            wget -q "https://packages.microsoft.com/config/ubuntu/22.04/packages-microsoft-prod.deb"
            dpkg -i packages-microsoft-prod.deb
            apt-get update && apt-get install -y powershell
          fi
          pwsh --version

      - name: Create version file
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if [ ! -f VERSION.txt ]; then
            echo -n "0.1.0" > VERSION.txt
          fi

      - name: Run version bumper with fixture data
        id: bump
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          # Use the minor commits fixture for a deterministic test
          $result = & ./Invoke-VersionBump.ps1 -VersionFile VERSION.txt -CommitLogFile ./fixtures/commits-minor.log
          # Capture the output for the step
          $result | ForEach-Object { Write-Host $_ }
          # Extract the new version from output
          $newVer = (Get-Content VERSION.txt).Trim()
          Write-Host "Bumped version is: $newVer"
          echo "new_version=$newVer" >> $env:GITHUB_OUTPUT

      - name: Verify version was bumped
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $ver = (Get-Content VERSION.txt).Trim()
          Write-Host "Final version in VERSION.txt: $ver"
          if ($ver -ne '0.2.0') {
            Write-Error "Expected version 0.2.0 but got $ver"
            exit 1
          }
          Write-Host "Version bump verified: $ver"

  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Install PowerShell
        shell: bash
        run: |
          if ! command -v pwsh &> /dev/null; then
            apt-get update && apt-get install -y wget apt-transport-https software-properties-common
            wget -q "https://packages.microsoft.com/config/ubuntu/22.04/packages-microsoft-prod.deb"
            dpkg -i packages-microsoft-prod.deb
            apt-get update && apt-get install -y powershell
          fi
          pwsh --version

      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $config = New-PesterConfiguration
          $config.Run.Path = './SemanticVersionBumper.Tests.ps1'
          $config.Output.Verbosity = 'Detailed'
          $config.Run.Exit = $true
          Invoke-Pester -Configuration $config
